CVE-2021-46225.title: A buffer overflow in the GmfOpenMesh() function of libMeshb v7.61 ...
CVE-2021-46225.description: A buffer overflow in the GmfOpenMesh() function of libMeshb v7.61 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted MESH file.
